data.title: Insilico Medicine to Announce 2025 Financial Results on March 30, 2026
data.description: A biotechnology company based in CAMBRIDGE, Massachusetts, revealed on March 13, 2026, that it will publish its financial results soon. Insilico Medicine, listed on the HKEX as 3696.HK, utilizes generative artificial intelligence for drug research and advancement.

data.title: L3Harris to Present at Upcoming Investor Conference
data.description: L3Harris Technologies, listed on the NYSE as LHX, is scheduled to participate in the J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference in Washington on March 18 at 12:55 p.m. ET. The presentation will be given by Ken Bedingfield, President of Missile Solutions, and will be streamed live on L3Harris.com. Following the event, a recording will be accessible. L3Harris Technologies positions itself as the Trusted Disruptor in defense technology, prioritizing customers' mission-critical requirements.

PENTAGON WEIGHS SENDING MORE WARSHIPS TO ESCORT TANKERS THROUGH STRAIT OF HORMUZ

PENTAGON CONSIDERS MORE WARSHIPS FOR HORMUZ ESCORTS The Pentagon is weighing sending additional warships to the Middle East to escort oil tankers through the Strait of Hormuz amid rising attacks by Iran. U.S. Central Command has requested more destroyers and Marine Corps
Officials say escort missions likely won’t begin until the threat from Iran is reduced—a process that could take a month or more even as U.S. strikes target Tehran’s missile and drone capabilities.

data.title: Rare Disease Campaign Launches Nationwide
data.description: A countrywide campaign has been launched on March 13, 2026, aiming to bring together patients, researchers, healthcare leaders, and advocates to advance awareness and innovation for rare diseases. Known as Mediaplanet Rare Diseases campaign, it is being introduced through USA Today and online platforms. This initiative seeks to unite individuals and organizations to accelerate progress in understanding and addressing rare diseases, with a focus on promoting collaboration and sharing insights. The campaign will feature key insights and perspectives on rare diseases, reaching a wide audience of readers and online users across the nation, with the goal of fostering greater understanding and support for those affected by these conditions.

data.title: UTulsa receives $12.6M in appropriations for AI, cyber, energy research
data.description: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, as of March 13, 2026, the University of Tulsa has recently been granted four federal appropriations to bolster key research projects. These initiatives are aimed at enhancing the country's energy resilience, progressing in the development of next-generation materials and manufacturing technologies, and establishing Oklahoma as a central hub for innovation.

data.title: Coinbase Short Interest Doubles In 2026: S3 Data Shows Elevated Potential For Short Squeeze
data.description: Short interest in the cryptocurrency trading platform Coinbase Global (NASDAQ: COIN) has doubled in 2026, with levels rising from 5% in December to around 10% currently. This surge in short interest coincides with the company's stock being down 18.3% year-to-date, contrasting with a 16.7% decline in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and a 2.5% drop in the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust. While Coinbase is not one of the most heavily shorted stocks overall, investors are keeping a close eye on the potential for a short squeeze as prices increase. This data was revealed in a new report from S3 Partners, indicating growing bearish sentiment towards the public company. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Rises On Surprise Inflation, GDP Data; Adobe Dives On Earnings (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index saw an increase following unexpected inflation and GDP figures. Adobe stock experienced a significant drop due to earnings results. This led to a positive day in the stock market, with the Dow rising. The surprise inflation and GDP data played a crucial role in this increase. Adobe's poor earnings report led to a dive in their stock value.
